roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PROP 47 PETITION FOR RESENTENCING OR RECLASSIFICATION FILED

/CAL: DEFENDANT'S PROP 47 PETITION/NP/X: NOT REPORTED/PET PROP47/PET GRTD/X: THE COURT REDUCES THE FELONY OFFENSE OF PENAL CODE SECTION 475(B) TOA MISDEMEANOR/CTORD: ANY RESTITUTION FINE PREVIOUSLY ORDERED THAT IS GREATER THAN $150 IS HEREBY REDUCED TO $150/CTORD: ANY BASE FINE PREVIOUSLY ORDERED THAT IS GREATER THAN $250 IS HEREBY REDUCED TO $250/X: ORDER FOR RESENTENCING OR RECLASSIFICATION (PENAL CODE SECTION 1170,18)SIGNED AND FILED/

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 1203,42 MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/X:THE COURT GRANTS MOTION PURSUANT TO PC 1203,42,/X:PURSUANT TO SIGNED AND FILED ORDER GUILTY PLEA ISSET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED,/X:ORDER FOR DISMISSAL SIGNEDAND FILED IN COURT,/
